sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 240, 241 & 242 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22 2. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant On 22.10.2020 and 02.02.2021, learned counsel sought time to prepare the case. Today learned counsel states that the issue before the court is squarely covered against the department by virtue of judgment reported as 2016 PTD 1667 and judgment of Supreme Court in the case of Millat Tractor’s reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof he does not press these reference applications which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
